title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Territorial Army Act, 1948. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1* * * and applies to all classes of persons in the Territorial Army, wherever they may be.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Hyderabad" omitted by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule.
